ORDER UPON STIPULATION OF CONFIDENTIALITY AND PROTECTIVE ORDER
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-04-2011 CONTINUED TO MAY-06-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED ON THE ISSUES ADDRESSED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFFS DORA SU-ORTIZ AND ERIASI AKRIDGE'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT AND APPROVING PROPOSED NOTICE TO CLASS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (A) THE COURT IS UNABLE TO ESTIMATE WHETHER EITHER (1) THE TOTAL SETTLEMENT SUM OF $600,000 OR (2) THE NET WHICH MAY BE ALLOCATED TO CLASS MEMBERS (TOTAL LESS FEES, COSTS, ADMINISTRATORS' FEES AND OTHER DEDUCTIONS) IS A FAIR ESTIMATE OF THE LIABILITY, COSTS AND RISKS OF THE LITIGATION. IN PARTICULAR, THE COURT WAS NOT ABLE TO DETERMINE THE NUMBER OF HOURS OR WAGES AT ISSUE. (B) THE NOTICE DOES NOT PROVIDE AN EASILY UNDERSTANDABLE ESTIMATE OF THE RECOVERY A CLASS MEMBER MAY OBTAIN FROM THE SETTLEMENT. EVEN IF THE PRECISE DOLLAR FIGURE CANNOT BE ESTIMATED AT THIS TIME, BOTH THE COURT AND CLASS MEMBERS REQUIRE A MEANS TO ESTIMATE AN APPROXIMATE NUMBER. FURTHER MOTIONS IN CONNECTION WITH THIS SETTLEMENT ARE TO BE NOTICED BEFORE JUDGE KARNOW WHO IS SITTING IN DEPT. 608 BY CALLING THE CLERK AND TO BE HEARD ON SHORTENED TIME. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Continued To Oct-02-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Unopposed Mtn For Unopposed Mtn For Order Of Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Approving Proposed Ntc To Class
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROSS L. LIBENSON, TEL. NO. (510) 763-5700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. PAULA M. WEBER OF PILLSBURY LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 983-7488 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT UNION BANK.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED ON THE ISSUES ADDRESSED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFFS DORA SU-ORTIZ AND ERIASI AKRIDGE'S MOTION For Order Of Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Approving Proposed Notice To Class is Denied without prejudice. (A) The Court is unable to estimate whether either (1) the total settlement sum of $600,000 or (2) the net which may be allocated to class members (total less fees, costs, administrators' fees and other deductions) is a fair estimate of the liability, costs and risks of the litigation. In particular, The Court was not able to determine the number of hours or wages at issue. (B) The notice does not provide an easily understandable estimate of the recovery a class member may obtain from the settlement. Even if the precise dollar figure cannot be estimated at this time, both the Court and class members require a means to estimate an approximate number. Further motions in connection with this settlement are to be noticed before Judge Karnow who is sitting in Dept. 608 by calling the clerk and to be heard on shortened time. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 597 =(302/CK)
